text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Echooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Echooo... echo... cho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and I have journeyed to the
mountains. As for why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, she believes it's a necessary step on her
path to winning the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...It'd be impossible for me to win the Triple
Crown right now. So I need to blast myself up to a
level where I can! One bullet train ticket to Triple
Crown town!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
To be more specific... I want to get good enough
to place in the top five at a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've improved so much in these past few months
of training! And I've reached my goal of placing in
a G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But this is just the start! Here await the final
lessons I need to boost my chances of winning
even higher!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So without further ado... Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pulls out a notebook with a list of training
exercises she plans to do today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Waterfall training, high-speed mountain
climbing... And to finish it off, a full sprint along
the coast!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Unlike my usual training, this stuff is hardcore!
One lapse in concentration could mean the
difference between life and death!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But if I can finish it all, it'll take both my mind and
body up a notch or two! No, make that five
notches!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna pull it off and get way stronger! Rrragh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Matikanetannhauser begins her special
training in high spirits. Until...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It's f-f-freezing! I give up!

text_block_list.name: Waterfall Training Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Ha-ha-ha! This is a pretty brutal season even for
us. You did really good for a beginner.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You guys are incredible! How do you look so
relaxed when it's so cold!

text_block_list.name: Waterfall Training Club Member B
text_block_list.text: I guess we're just used to it.

text_block_list.name: Waterfall Training Club Member B
text_block_list.text:
The sunlight hits that spot over there, so it's a
little warmer. Go get your body used to the
water.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then she attempts high-speed mountain
climbing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I am speed! High-speed climbing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mountain-Climbing Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
You've got some amazing leg strength. As
expected from an Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks a lot. Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Agh! Sorry about that!

text_block_list.name: Mountain-Climbing Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right. We've got some pork soup over
there. You can have some if you're hungry.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Y-you're sure it's okay?!

text_block_list.name: Mountain-Climbing Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Of course. There's plenty to go around, so help
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Awesome! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And her final training exercise—a sprint across the
twilight coast...

text_block_list.name: Volleyball Club Captain
text_block_list.text:
Here we go... Ina High! ♪
Gotta be... super tough! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Super tough! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I was running all by myself when I happened upon
this volleyball club.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I was a bit lonely on my own, so they let me join
them! Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Volleyball Club Member
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser's falling behind, Captain!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh! I gotta go! Talk to you later, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's run... Ina High! ♪ No sweat... Not yet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Volleyball Club
text_block_list.text: Not yet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was expecting her special training to be a bit
more... grueling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's shown me how easily Matikanetannhauser
fits in with others thanks to her friendly
personality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And everything else aside, she's already done
great in a G1 race. If we keep this up, then even
the Triple Crown should be within reach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, next up is the Satsuki Sho! It's
time to get back to work!
